subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath come from the heaven of utterance with proof and testimony, and summoned all unto the loftiest pinnacle, the Most High Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اتی من سماء البیان بالحجه و البرهان و دعا الکل الی الذروه العلیا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life, @call to action
